---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

::: {.grid}

::: {.card}
## Customer Churn Prediction

Built a machine learning model to predict customer churn.

**Tools:** Python, pandas, scikit-learn  

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/saorikikuchi)
:::

::: {.card}
## Data Analysis Project

Analyzed real-world dataset to extract insights.

**Tools:** Excel, Python  

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/saorikikuchi)
:::

:::

<<<<<<< HEAD
Here are selected projects that demonstrate my skills in data analysis, machine learning, and problem solving.

---

## 1. Customer Churn Prediction

### Overview
This project focused on predicting whether a customer would leave a company based on historical customer data. The goal was to identify patterns related to churn and support better retention strategies.

### Tools and Technologies
- Python
- Pandas
- Scikit-learn
- Matplotlib
- Jupyter Notebook

### What I Did
- Cleaned and prepared the dataset for analysis
- Performed exploratory data analysis to identify important variables
- Built and compared machine learning classification models
- Evaluated model performance using common metrics such as accuracy and F1-score

### Outcome
This project helped me strengthen my understanding of supervised learning, feature selection, and model evaluation. I also learned how to communicate technical findings in a clear and practical way.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername/churn-project)

---

## 2. Sales Performance Dashboard

### Overview
This project analyzed sales data to identify trends in revenue, customer behavior, and product performance. The aim was to create a clear and useful dashboard for decision-making.

### Tools and Technologies
- Python
- SQL
- Tableau / Power BI
- Excel

### What I Did
- Organized and cleaned raw sales data
- Queried relevant information using SQL
- Built visualizations to show monthly trends and key performance indicators
- Summarized business insights from the dashboard

### Outcome
This project improved my skills in business analytics and data visualization. It also helped me understand how dashboards can support practical business decisions.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername/sales-dashboard)

---

## 3. Portfolio Website with Quarto

### Overview
This project involved designing and deploying a personal portfolio website using Quarto and GitHub Pages. The goal was to present my academic background, projects, and professional goals in a clean and accessible format.

### Tools and Technologies
- Quarto
- Markdown
- HTML/CSS
- GitHub Pages

### What I Did
- Designed a multi-page website structure
- Created pages for About, Projects, CV, and Contact
- Customized navigation and layout
- Published the site online using GitHub Pages

### Outcome
This project improved my understanding of static website development, project organization, and online professional branding.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/saorikikuchi/my-website)

=======
## Project 1

Description of your project.

## Project 2

Description of your project.
>>>>>>> 173b0ea04efe5211bb32ae59942a8440eaaa8396
